summary: Tested Priority 2 Features: Auto-Bid System, Watchlist, VIP Loyalty Program. Backend APIs for Auto-Bid and Watchlist work correctly (100%). VIP Loyalty has CRITICAL backend bug - router is overwritten by loyalty_program router. Frontend pages load correctly but VIP Loyalty features fail due to backend issue.

critical.issue: Returns 404 - VIP loyalty router is overwritten by loyalty_program router in server.py. Line 125 imports loyalty_router from loyalty_program.py which overwrites the import from line 57 (loyalty.py). Both routers use prefix='/loyalty'.
critical.root_cause: In server.py: Line 57 imports 'from routers.loyalty import router as loyalty_router', but Line 125 imports 'from routers.loyalty_program import loyalty_router' which OVERWRITES the first import. The VIP loyalty endpoints are never registered.
critical.fix: Rename one of the routers to use a different prefix (e.g., /api/vip-loyalty for VIP loyalty or /api/restaurant-loyalty for restaurant loyalty)

critical.issue: Returns 404 - Same root cause as above. VIP loyalty router not registered.

minor.issue: Returns restaurant loyalty data (stamps, levels) instead of VIP loyalty data (points, tiers). This is because loyalty_program.py router is registered instead of loyalty.py router.
Returns restaurant leaderboard format (list) instead of VIP leaderboard format ({period, leaderboard}). Same root cause.

integration_issues.issue: Clicking 'Täglichen Bonus abholen' shows error toast 'Fehler beim Abholen' because backend returns 404
Tab content is empty because /api/loyalty/tiers returns 404
Shows 'Wochen-Rangliste' (weekly leaderboard with prizes) instead of VIP loyalty leaderboard. This appears to be from a different feature.

frontend_elements: Page title 'Auto-Bid Manager' with lightning icon
Info box 'Wie funktioniert Auto-Bid?' with 4 bullet points
Page title 'Meine Watchlist' with heart icon
Empty state 'Keine Auktionen auf der Watchlist'

vip_loyalty.frontend_status: PARTIAL - UI loads but features fail
frontend_elements: Page title 'VIP Treueprogramm' with crown icon
Tabs: Dein Status, Alle Stufen, Rangliste
Status card showing Bronze tier with 0 Punkte

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix VIP loyalty router conflict in server.py - rename one router's prefix to avoid collision
Option 1: Change loyalty.py prefix to '/vip-loyalty' and update frontend API calls
Option 2: Change loyalty_program.py prefix to '/restaurant-loyalty' and update frontend API calls
Update VIPLoyalty.jsx to use correct API endpoints after fix
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 57: 'from routers.loyalty import router as loyalty_router'
server.py line 125: 'from routers.loyalty_program import loyalty_router' - THIS OVERWRITES THE FIRST IMPORT
Both routers use prefix='/loyalty' causing endpoint collision
VIP loyalty endpoints (tiers, claim-daily) are never registered

success_rate.frontend: 80% (All pages load, VIP Loyalty features fail due to backend)

context_for_next_testing_agent: VIP Loyalty backend has critical router conflict. Auto-Bid and Watchlist features work correctly. Authentication persistence issue from iteration 82 still exists but can be worked around by navigating within same session after login.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: VIP Loyalty endpoints return 404 or wrong data
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: In server.py, two different routers are imported with the same variable name 'loyalty_router'. The second import (line 125 from loyalty_program.py) overwrites the first import (line 57 from loyalty.py). Both routers use the same prefix '/loyalty', so only the restaurant loyalty endpoints are registered.
reproduction_steps: 3. Call GET /api/loyalty/status with auth - Returns restaurant loyalty data (stamps) instead of VIP loyalty data (points)
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Rename one of the routers to use a different prefix. Recommended: Change loyalty.py to use prefix='/vip-loyalty' and update VIPLoyalty.jsx to call /api/vip-loyalty/* endpoints.
